usd_reason: Lack of significant economic news is keeping the USD stable
gold_reason: Geopolitical tensions and uncertainty are driving investors to safe-haven assets
indices_reason: Rising concerns over global economic instability are weighing on market sentiment
lead_story: The US economy is facing uncertainty due to geopolitical tensions and regulatory changes. The recent news on AI development and its potential impact on the job market is also a concern. The Fed's task force on AI may bring more clarity on the issue in the coming days
